After you save all engagement emails, a confirmation dialog appears. Click Save & Start to begin sending engagement emails immediately. Note: You must publish the microsite to activate the engagement sequence. Click Save & Start to begin sending engagement emails immediately. Note: You must publish the microsite to activate the engagement sequence. Click I'll Send Later to save the sequence as a draft or if the microsite remains unpublished. Click I'll Send Later to save the sequence as a draft or if the microsite remains unpublished. After you publish the microsite, a Start button appears below the Engagement Emails list. Click Start to begin sending engagement emails. Once the emails are sent, you can view performance metrics such as Sent, Opened, Clicked, and Unsubscribed. Set up broadcast emails Use broadcast emails to send timely updates such as reminders or nudges after the event begins. To create a broadcast email: Log in to your Engage account using your credentials. Log in to your Engage account using your credentials. Select the event you want to set up the broadcast email for. Select the event you want to set up the broadcast email for. Go to Emails > Broadcast Emails. Go to Emails > Broadcast Emails. Click Add Email . Click Add Email . Apply filters in the email editor to target specific candidates. Apply filters in the email editor to target specific candidates. Compose the email content. Compose the email content. (Optional) Click Save as Draft if you are not ready to send the message. (Optional) Click Save as Draft if you are not ready to send the message. (Optional) Click Send Preview Email to review the message in your inbox. (Optional) Click Send Preview Email to review the message in your inbox. Click Send Email to deliver the message to the selected recipients. Click Send Email to deliver the message to the selected recipients.
